changes.comment: per-provider-testbed-scenarios cluster — cross-provider continuation forwarding (continuationMessages flows to OpenAI Responses / Gemini / xAI); Gemini function-declaration schema sanitization (recursive strip of additionalProperties + $schema for the OpenAPI 3.0 subset); IAiStreamDone.incompleteReason?: string captures OpenAI/xAI Responses incomplete_details.reason; OpenAI Responses item_id <-> call_id correlation for reasoning models; buildOpenAiContinuation emits required call_id; provider-drift instrumentation on Anthropic and OpenAI Responses adapters (RECOGNIZED_*_EVENTS allowlists + ai-assist:unrecognized-event warn tag)
